parsed.production_notes: The image is entirely composed of digital graphic elements, text, and UI-style boxes. There are no photographic elements.

scenes.setting: digital graphic, white background, colorful boxes

panels.panel_visual_description: The image is a digital graphic with a white background. It features four distinct, brightly colored rectangular boxes arranged in a grid-like pattern. The top left box is blue, the top right is green, the bottom left is orange, and the bottom right is purple. Each box has a small, colored tab on its top edge. Below the boxes is a smaller, rectangular button with a gradient color scheme.

scenes.visual_description: The image is an infographic with a white background. At the top, bold black text reads 'Learn English with an AI that adjusts to your vocabulary.' Below this are four colored boxes representing language proficiency levels. The top left blue box is labeled 'A1 Beginner' and lists basic vocabulary. The top right green box is labeled 'A2 Elementary' with slightly more advanced words. The bottom left orange box is 'B1 Intermediate', and the bottom right purple box is 'B2 Upper Intermediate', each listing progressively complex vocabulary. At the bottom center is a gradient button with the text 'START NOW'.
scenes.on_screen_text:
Learn English with an AI that adjusts to your vocabulary.
A1 Beginner
• hello / hi / bye
• name, age, country
• yes / no / please / thank you
• food, water, coffee
• work, home, family
• good, bad, big, small
• I like / I don't like
• What is this?
• I want / I need
• numbers 1-100, colors, days
A2 Elementary
• usually / sometimes
• yesterday / tomorrow / now
• can / can't / have to
• go, come, take, say
• friend, weekend, movie
• I think / I guess
• how much? / how many?
• because / but / and
• do the dishes, make the bed
• I'm tired / I'm hungry
B1 Intermediate
• I've been / I've done
• kind of / really / actually
• honestly / to be honest
• depends / not sure
• busy, excited, frustrated, worried
• What do you mean?
• avoid / take care of
• in my opinion / I agree / I disagree
• habits, goals, challenges
• daily routine, healthy lifestyle, bad habits
B2 Upper Intermediate
• finally / basically / obviously
• figure out / deal with / run out of
• confident / overwhelmed / disappointed
• could have / should have / would have
• as far as I know / as soon as possible
• to be honest / to tell the truth
• as far as I know / as soon as possible
• to be honest / to tell the truth
• at the end of the day / make sense
• mindset / attention span / multitasking
• small difference, long-term solution
• as far as I know / as soon as possible
START NOW
